title: 12pcs Christmas Glitter Artificial Poinsettia Flowers with 12pcs Stems for Wedding Christmas Tree Faux Flowers New Year Ornaments Xmas Garland Wreath Decorations(Silver)
features: Package Includes- You will get 12pcs poinsettia artificial flowers and 12pcs flower stems, silver with glitter powder, about 5.3inches/13.5 cm in diameter, get the Christmas tree theme ready with glittering Christmas tree flowers ,which will make the tree more attractive and add more holiday atmosphere.

EASY TO DECORATE: Comes with stems that can be easily pushed into the stem holes and fixed on the Christmas tree, Christmas wreath wreath or branches and help give it a real bright and even pop to add a festive atmosphere to Christmas.

HIGH QUALITY AND DURABLE MATERIAL: This glitter poinsettia is made of high quality fabric and plastic, durable, flexible and not easily deformed. Each Christmas flower is covered with plenty of glitter powder, which makes the Christmas tree more attractive and festive. Note: The glitter powder will come off somewhat when used.

GLITTER POINSETTIA ARTIFICIAL FLOWERS: The silver Christmas artificial flower is a bundle of glitter round anthers and filaments protruding from their center. Layers of spiky petals connect to create elegant, shiny blooms.

MULTIPLE STYLES OF CHRISTMAS DECORATIONS: These Christmas flower decorations are perfect for Christmas tree decoration, can be used for holiday party wedding, birthday party, New Year or other holiday decoration.
description: Product Description 12 PCS Poinsettia Christmas Flowers Artificial, Xmas Tree Poinsettia Decoration, Poinsettias Artificial Christmas Flowers for Christmas Trees HCSSZ Poinsettia Christmas Tree Decorations of Features: Material: Fabric and Plastic Size: Approx. 5.3inches/13.5 cm Package includes: 12x Christmas Poinsettia Artificial Flowes 12x Flower Stems Material: Fabric and Plastic Size: Approx. 5.3inches/13.5 cm Package includes: 12x Christmas Poinsettia Artificial Flowes 12x Flower Stems Material: Fabric and Plastic Size: Approx. 5.3inches/13.5 cm Package includes: 12x Christmas Poinsettia Artificial Flowes 12x Flower Stems Christmas Poinsettia Artificial Flower with Stems Christmas Poinsettia Artificial Flower with Stems Christmas Poinsettia Artificial Flower with Stems Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 272 4.2 out of 5 stars 272 4.2 out of 5 stars 272 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.99 £ 6 . 99 Quantity 12PCS 12PCS 12PCS Color Gold Silver Red+Gold Size 5.3inches 5.3inches 5.3inches
